description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a simple rectangular footprint and a red gable roof. The exterior walls are painted a muted mauve color, and the house features several rectangular windows with white frames arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front facade includes a single main door and three windows, while the side and rear facades have additional windows. The interior, visible from a cutaway view, reveals two floors with wooden flooring and wallpapered walls, as well as a staircase connecting the levels. The house appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, with a tiled roof and glass windows, and is designed for urban or suburban environments.
description: A mauve two-story house with a red gable roof, white-framed windows, and a main entry door, featuring a visible interior with two floors and a staircase.
description_view_0: Front and left side of the house showing the main door, three front windows, and two side windows.
description_view_1: Rear view of the house with a plain mauve wall and the red gable roof, no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Right side and partial front view, showing two right-side windows and the main entry door.
description_view_3: Cutaway view revealing the full interior layout, including two floors, wooden flooring, wallpaper, and a staircase.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or overhang, flanked by windows
